configurations.name: Attach to mGBA GDB stub (host:2345)
configurations.preLaunchTask: Prepare Debug Session (build + launch host mGBA)

configurations.name: Run ROM on host mGBA (no debugger)
configurations.command: bash -lc 'bash scripts/build_and_copy_rom.sh release && MGBA_DEBUG=0 bash scripts/launch_mgba_via_bridge.sh'
